title: Senior Radiologist at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Indraprastha Apollo Capital India:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
